title: 3 in 1 Kitchen Sink Drain Strainer Sink Stopper, Stainless Steel Sink Drain Strainer with Anti-Clogging Basket, Kitchen Sink Drain Filter Plug for US Standard 3-1/2 Inch Drain (2Pack)
features: 3 In 1 Kitchen Sink Drain Strainer: This kitchen sink drain strainer combines three key functions: water storage, filtration and anti-clogging. With just a simple press, you can switch between storing water or letting it drain quickly. With its stainless steel basket, it can effectively catch the collect food scraps while allowing for quick drainage and prevents clogging. combining the water storage, sink filter, and odor isolation functions, this 3 in 1 sink strainer stopper simplifies kitchen tasks, making the workflow more efficient and enhancing your overall kitchen experience.

Fast Drainage and Anti- Clogging: Our kitchen sink drain stopper helps save water, prevent cloggs and collects food scraps while allowing quick drainage. This makes kitchen tasks more efficient and helps keep the sink clean and functional. The removable anti-clog basket is easy to install and take out which makes disposing of kitchen waste simple and mess free. This strainer also has large drainage holes around the edges, ensuring fast drainage. Plus, the multiple rubber gaskets offer protection against bad odors, backflow, leaks, and pests. It helps maintain a clean and fresh kitchen environment.

Stainless Steel 3 in 1 kitchen sink drain strainer: Crafted with premium brushed stainless steel , our 3 in 1 sink strainer stopper offers exceptional resistance to corrosion, scratches, and high temperatures, ensuring long-lasting performance. The built-in sink core pop up bounce device is tested for a 100,000 life span of use and the garbage disposal stopper basket is also durable and environmentally friendly, making disposing of sink waste effortless and keeps your hands clean.

3 in 1 drain strainer stopper Fit US Standard Drain: Our sink stopper kitchen drain is designed to fit US Standard 3-1/2 inch kitchen drains with width 2.95"-3.42" and depth＞1.46" opening sink hole. Our sink strainer and kitchen sink stopper is suitable for most kitchen sinks. Please make sure your sink drain hole is suitable with the kitchen sink strainer before ordering.

Perfect kitchen sink drain stopper: The strainer is made from high quality brushed SUS 304 stainless steel, giving it a sleek, modern look that fits perfectly in any kitchen. This 3 in 1 sink strainer stopper is also resistant to heat, rust, and scratches. The built-in brass and electroplated press spring stopper adds extra durability making it a great choice for homes, restaurants, or hotels. With just a simple press, you can switch between storing water or letting it drain quickly.
description: ULIOLI 3 in 1 Kitchen Sink Drain Strainer and Sink Stopper, Stainless Steel Sink Drain Strainer with Anti-Clogging Basket, Pop Up Kitchen Sink Drain Filter Plug for US Standard 3-1/2 Inch Drain
